case_title: KIM NGUYEN VS. LI YUN YUAN et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-07-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-06-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-07-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM SERVED JAN-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, LI YUN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
